name: PM-KISAN
description: Income support of ₹6,000/year to all landholding farmer families

additional_rules: Must have land registered in name or family member
Should not be a government employee
Should not be income tax payer

benefit_description: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each

deep_eligibility_questions.question: Do you have an active bank account linked to Aadhaar?
Are you or any household member a government employee?
Do you or any household member pay income tax?
